mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, password, name, phone, gender, age, height, weight, activity_level, purpose FROM user_table ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_table ( user_id, password, name, phone, gender, age, height, weight, activity_level, purpose ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{activityLevel}, #{purpose} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_table SET user_id = #{userId}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, activity_level = #{activityLevel}, purpose = #{purpose} WHERE id = #{id}
